meta.produced_by: scripts/schema/drift-detect.ts (SD-C detector, run directly with DRIFT_DETECT_DB_URL)
meta.rationale: First end-to-end SD-C CI run on commit e49af672 cascade-skipped due to pre-existing Typecheck failure. PR #350 (dotenv) cleared Typecheck but Lint cascade-skipped on commit 1bfaa53b. CI-RESTORE work is sustained; this Track-1 out-of-band run unblocks SD-A's PIV-1 in the meantime. See specs/ci-restore/.
meta.detector_version: scripts/schema/drift-detect.ts @ commit on main (introduced in PR #349)
run_notes: Detector run is authoritative: includes table, column, index, and function drift (the four kinds the parser covers).
Earlier Track-1 re-implementation (snapshot 2026-04-27) excluded indexes; this run does not. The two reports' counts therefore differ — index findings are the dominant addition here.
Live-state queries: information_schema.tables, information_schema.columns, pg_indexes, pg_proc.

critical_caveat_null_statements.summary: 31 of 309 migrations have NULL statements in supabase_migrations.schema_migrations. Detector cannot parse what isn't there; drift on these migrations is INVISIBLE to SD-C in its current form.
critical_caveat_null_statements.implication: These migrations were registered to schema_migrations without their SQL. Likely path: `supabase migration repair --status applied` or manual INSERT INTO schema_migrations. The .sql files exist on disk in supabase/migrations/, but the DB never recorded the SQL. Drift may exist on any of these and the detector will report 0 findings.
critical_caveat_null_statements.canonical_example: watchlist_entries table from migration 20260513_watchlist_workout — confirmed missing from live state via direct query, but reported as 0 drift here because the migration's statements column is NULL.
critical_caveat_null_statements.for_sd_a: SD-A bucket-assignment must include a separate sweep: read the .sql file from disk for each of these NULL-statement migrations, parse for expected objects, cross-check against live state. This sweep is independent of the findings in this report.
critical_caveat_null_statements.for_sd_b: Root cause investigation should start with these NULL-statement migrations. The cluster from late-March 2026 onward suggests a deploy-pipeline behavior change around that time.
critical_caveat_null_statements.for_sd_c_followup: Detector enhancement: when statements are NULL, fall back to reading supabase/migrations/<version>_<n>.sql from the repo and parsing that. Out of scope for SD-C Phase 1; should be tracked as SD-C Phase 1.5 or rolled into SD-B.
